# Text-to-SQL Chatbot

## Description
Natural language to SQL query chatbot using LangChain LCEL, Groq LLM, Gemini, and RAGAS evaluation. Users ask questions in plain English and get SQL queries + database results.

## Tech Stack
- Python 3.11, Streamlit, LangChain (LCEL), Groq (llama-3.3-70b-versatile), Google Gemini (2.0/2.5 Flash), SQLite, RAGAS, HuggingFace Embeddings (all-MiniLM-L6-v2)

## Core Files
- app.py: Main Streamlit app with chat interface and RAGAS evaluation dashboard
- 1.py: Minimal Gemini chain (45 lines)
- 2.py: Groq chain + RAGAS evaluation script (142 lines)
- create_db.py: CSV to SQLite data migration

## Key Patterns
- LCEL chain: RunnablePassthrough.assign(schema=...) | prompt | llm | StrOutputParser()
- RAGAS: SingleTurnSample with user_input, retrieved_contexts, response, reference
- SQL cleanup: re.sub markdown fences, join into single line

## Entry Point
streamlit run app.py

## API Keys (.env)
GROQ_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY

## Database
SQLite auto-seeded from Data_CSV/*.csv (Customers, Products, Regions, sales_order, State_Regions, Budgets_2017)

## Evaluation
5 hardcoded benchmark queries evaluated on Context Precision (0-1) and Helpfulness Rubrics (1-5)
